title: XenAddons
description: A mod who bringing back somes features from 1.8.9 Hypixel mods
body:
# XenAddons
[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/xenaddons?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=007F43&label=Downloads&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/mod/xenaddons) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1473269453213925492?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=1E3A8A)](https://discord.gg/yRbJJwGTPG) [![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/xenaddons?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Version&color=E67E22)](https://modrinth.com/mod/xenaddons) [![Cosmetics Portal](https://img.shields.io/badge/Cosmetics-Portal-00AF5C?style=for-the-badge&logo=firefoxbrowser&logoColor=white)](https://addons.xenus.fr/login) **A Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 focused on Hypixel SkyBlock QoL**
XenAddons is a Fabric mod for Minecraft **1.21.11** focused on Hypixel SkyBlock quality-of-life features. ## Compatibility - Minecraft: `1.21.11` - Mod loader: `Fabric` - Java: `21+` ## Main Commands - `/xa` - Open XenAddons GUI - `/xenaddons` - Open XenAddons GUI - `/xa hud` - Open HUD editor - `/pcc` - Shortcut for `/chat party` ## Features ### Category: MISC - **Bazaar/AH Quick Search**: Search hovered items instantly on the Bazaar or Auction House. - **Command Aliases**: Adds useful SkyBlock command shortcuts. - **Compact Potion Message**: Shortens potion effect chat messages. - **Cooldown Items**: Displays item ability cooldowns. - **Copy Chat**: Right-click chat messages to copy their content. - **Cursor 1.8.9**: Restores inventory cursor behavior closer to Minecraft 1.8.9. - **Custom Hyperion Sound**: Replaces Wither Blade sounds with selectable custom sounds. - **Exp Table Addons**: Keeps Experimentation Table items visible. - **Inventory Buttons**: Adds configurable inventory buttons. - **Item Price**: Shows item prices in tooltips. - **Lava Replacement**: Replaces lava visuals with water visuals. - **Peek Chat**: Temporarily displays expanded chat without opening chat. - **Spotify Overlay**: Displays the current Spotify track as a HUD element, with optional better display controls. - **ZguegAddons**: Extra chat, dungeon, and party utilities. ### Category: DUNGEONS - **AutoPet Title**: Replaces AutoPet equip chat messages with HUD notifications. - **Bat Death Alert**: Alerts when a bat dies in dungeons. - **Better Party Finder**: Improves Party Finder messages with player stats and quick actions. - **Dungeon Not Full Alert**: Warns at dungeon start if the party is not full. - **Invisibility Timer**: Tracks Bonzo's Mask, Spirit Mask, and Phoenix Pet invulnerability timers. - **Item Quality**: Adds dungeon item quality information to item tooltips. - **Mask Reminder**: Reminds you to equip Spirit Mask or Bonzo's Mask during relevant dungeon phases. - **Milestone Reminder**: Displays dungeon milestone progress and sends reminders when needed. - **Players Leaped**: Displays leap progress in F7 terminal-related zones. - **Pos Message**: Sends party callouts when reaching configured dungeon spots. - **Pos Titles**: Displays teammate callouts as movable HUD text. - **Reminder Gate**: Shows gate reminders based on lever progress messages. - **SecretRoutes**: Renders dungeon routes, secrets, waypoints, and room helpers. ### Category: DEV - **Config GUI**: Customize the GUI appearance and theme settings. - **Cosmetics**: Applies custom names, player scaling, and cosmetics refresh with a 30s cooldown. - **Edit HUD**: Move, scale, and reset HUD elements. - **Debug**: Internal testing and debugging tools. ## Visual Words / Custom Data XenAddons uses a unified cosmetics snapshot. ### Features: - Visual name replacements - Custom player scale - UUID-based mapping for stable behavior across nick/display changes ### Cosmetics Portal ```txt https://addons.xenus.fr/login ``` ## Update Checker - Checks for updates once per launch. - Shows update status in chat. - Can download the latest release directly into the `mods/` folder. - Requires a restart after updating. ## Config File ```txt .minecraft/config/xenaddons_config.json ```
